title: Advanced Automated IHC and ISH Solutions
name: Dako Omnis solution
description: The Dako Omnis solution for automated IHC, double staining, IF, ICC, and ISH staining consists of staining instruments, reagents, accessories, and software. It is designed to address the needs and challenges faced by lab managers, lab technicians, and pathologists. It supports pathology labs in efficiently and cost-effectively managing increasing test demands with a quality that ensures reliable, reproducible staining results. For over half a century, Dako reagents have been synonymous with high quality. This legacy, combined with Agilent's advanced analytic capabilities, forms the backbone of the development and manufacturing of high-quality antibodies, companion diagnostics, staining platforms, and software. Together, these integrate seamlessly to deliver comprehensive pathology lab solutions, bringing certainty to diagnostic tissue staining. The Dako Omnis family of instruments includes the models: Dako Omnis 165 Duo, Dako Omnis 165, Dako Omnis 110, and Dako Omnis.

title: Analytical Reference Materials & Standards
name: Agilent ULTRA Analytical Standards and Certified Reference Materials for your applications and workflows
description: Agilent, now with former Ultra Scientific, offers a comprehensive portfolio of analytical standards, spectroscopy standards, reference materials, and certified reference materials for environmental, food safety, elemental analysis, instrument calibration, tuning mixes, and more. Reference materials and certified reference materials are substances that are tested to be homogenous and have fixed values of its concentrations. These chromatography standards are a critical component of your application workflow, which encompasses sample prep, instruments, columns, supplies, and services. The success of your analysis depends upon the quality of your reference material. All Agilent standard reference materials have been manufactured to the highest quality in an ISO 9001, ISO 17025 and 17034 accredited facilities to ensure the accuracy of your analyses.

title: Application Kits
name: Comprehensive application-specific start-up kits to set up your lab faster.
description: Set up your lab faster with Agilent application-specific start-up kits for various compounds and markets. Comprehensive application kits provide all the necessary components for optimal sample preparation and analysis, including sample preparation supplies specifically designed to meet regulatory requirements. Agilent application kits are designed for optimal performance and consistency across multiple runs. The supplies, consumables, and columns in these application kits are also available as standalone items.

title: PFAS Testing Kits
name: Comprehensive portfolio of testing kits designed to comply with stringent PFAS testing methods.
description: Agilent offers a comprehensive portfolio of PFAS testing kits designed to comply with stringent testing methods for per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS). The PFAS start-up kits include specialized consumables and sample preparation supplies to minimize PFAS background to meet regulatory requirements. Features like PFAS-specific sample prep, certified PFAS-free vials, and advanced columns, simplify the process, ensuring that laboratories can achieve compliance with confidence. These kits include everything you need to get started. The supplies, consumables, and columns in these PFAS testing kits are also available as standalone items.

title: Environmental Kits
name: Comprehensive portfolio of environmental start-up kits
description: Agilent offers a comprehensive portfolio of environmental kits, which include the application specific columns and supplies you need to get started. You can now set up your lab faster with method-specific environmental kits. Comprehensive kits provide all the necessary components for sample preparation and analysis, including analytical columns and sample vials. Agilent environmental kits are designed for optimal performance and consistency across multiple runs. The supplies, consumables, and columns in these environmental testing kits are also available as standalone items.

title: Food and Beverage Testing Kits
name: Comprehensive portfolio of food and beverage testing kits
description: Agilent offers a comprehensive portfolio of food and beverage testing kits, which include application-specific columns and supplies you need to get started. You can now set up your lab faster with method-specific food and beverage testing kits. Comprehensive kits provide all the necessary components for sample preparation and analysis, including analytical columns and vials. Agilent food and beverage testing kits are designed for optimal performance and consistency across multiple runs.The supplies, consumables, and columns in these food and beverage testing kits are also available as standalone items.

title: Material Testing & Research Kits
name: Comprehensive portfolio of material testing and research kits
description: Agilent offers material testing and research kits for the detection, identification, and management of impurities in raw materials, intermediates, and finished products. Agilent's material testing kits and material research kits feature specific supplies to suit organic, high-TDS, or routine applications. Each material testing kit is designed to support robust analyses by providing the sample introductory supplies you need for your workflow, in one place.

title: Atomic Spectroscopy
name: Atomic Spectroscopy: The Value of Knowing
description: Knowing the right information at the right time can help you cut through the everyday complexities of your samples, instrument needs, regulations, other demands on your time and resources – and help you handle unexpected challenges. The most valuable thing an analytical solution can deliver is the confidence of knowing you’ll get the answers you need, when you need them. Driven by insights from customers from around the world, Agilent has created an innovative atomic spectroscopy portfolio – spanning instruments, consumables, standards, services, software, and more – to bring that confidence to your lab.

title: Automated Electrophoresis
name: Automated Electrophoresis nucleic acid and protein QC solutions for variable throughputs
description: Exceed your expectations with an automated electrophoresis system from Agilent. With throughput capabilities ranging from ultralow to ultrahigh and multiple kits and reagents to choose from, there is no telling where your research could take you. Learn more about the ten automated electrophoresis instruments Agilent offers as well as the intuitive software and accessories that will take your research to new heights.

title: Automated Liquid Handling
name: Automated Liquid Handling
description: Agilent's space-saving and flexible automated liquid handling solutions enable simplified sample preparation with consistent high accuracy. Automation allows labs to free up manual labor and run more samples while maintaining reproducibility. Application-specific lab automation liquid handling solutions address sample preparation needs for proteins, metabolites, as well as genomics and NGS applications, reducing set up times and protocol development. Our powerful open liquid handling platform can be tailored to serve a broad range of application needs, with more than 60 deck accessories spanning from magnetic bead separation and vacuum filtration to heating/cooling and shaking. Products for plate sealing, barcode labeling, and centrifugation bring additional capabilities to your lab. Intuitive instrument control software allows easy startup and requires little training effort, for further increased lab productivity.

title: Biomolecules, Conjugation, Synthesis & Purification
name: Improved Analysis with Biomolecule Synthesis and Purification Solutions
description: Agilent's biomolecule synthesis and purification products help analysts develop more precise and efficient HPLC workflows for the analysis of oligonucleotides and peptide synthesis. Agilent’s resins and biosynthesis solutions boost the performance of your LC columns, allowing you to identify and characterize biomolecules.

title: Biopharma HPLC Analysis
name: Bio Columns and Bio Consumables for Critical Quality Attributes (CQAs)
description: The importance of understanding the attributes of a biologic drug, and the processes used to create it, cannot be underestimated.  Agilent AdvanceBio LC columns are designed and produced to provide results you can be sure of when analyzing highly complex biotherapeutic molecules and monitoring their purity, potency, and other critical quality attributes.

title: Cell Analysis
name: Confidently Dive into the Biology with Real-Time, Live Cell Kinetic and Phenotypic Measures
description: Gain deeper and more relevant insights of the most intractable diseases and their potential therapies with live cell, real-time measurements. Uncover unique cell biology, discover novel drug targets, improve pre-clinical toxicology, and pioneer the next generation of immunotherapies. What started as a unique offering of solutions focused on understanding cellular functionality based on underlying metabolic programing has transformed into a market-leading set of innovative tools by joining with ACEA Biosciences and BioTek Instruments.

title: Certified Pre-Owned Lab Instruments
name: Fully Refurbished and Affordable Laboratory Equipment
description: The Agilent Certified Pre-Owned Instrument program offers a reliable option for refurbished laboratory equipment, providing peace-of-mind on a budget. Each used instrument undergoes a thorough refurbishment process by expert technicians and must pass the same performance specifications as when it was first manufactured. With over 200 instrument models across 14 product lines, Agilent offers the most comprehensive portfolio of refurbished used laboratory equipment on the market, giving thousands of instruments a second life each year. When you purchase an Agilent Certified Pre-Owned Instrument, you receive the same installation and introduction experience as with a new Agilent instrument, along with a 12-month warranty. For any technology and any budget, Agilent Certified Pre-Owned Instruments has an option to fit your laboratory needs.

title: CGH & CGH+SNP Microarray Platform
name: CGH + SNP Microarray Analysis Platform
description: Learn about Agilent’s industry leading CGH + SNP Microarray platform for your workflows and clinical research needs. Agilent provides a complete platform including microarrays, reagents, hardware and software. With almost 20 years’ experience and thousands of publications, Agilent’s CGH platform is widely adopted by cytogenetics labs running pre- and post-natal, preimplantation and cancer clinical research. The platform enables to quickly and reliably identify aneuploidies, microdeletions, microduplications, as well as other types of chromosomal aberrations across the genome. Agilent’s CGH platform offers real comparative genomic data thanks to the 2-color approach, and unlimited flexibility in terms of format and content. Learn more about our catalog and custom microarrays.

title: Chromatography Columns
name: Explore our chromatography columns for ion, gas, and liquid chromatography.
description: Explore the largest portfolio of chromatography columns, designed for use with ion, gas, and liquid chromatography systems. Chromatography column types include bio columns, HPLC columns for small molecule separations, gel permeation chromatography (GPC) columns, size exclusion chromatography (SEC), gas chromatography (GC), and UHPLC. Agilent columns are designed for optimal performance and consistent results across multiple runs.

title: Chromatography Syringes & Needles
name: Achieve Accurate & Precise Sample Injection with Agilent Analytical Syringes & Needles
description: Chromatography syringes & needles are a critical component of the sample flow-path, transporting the sample between the storage vial and the instrument inlet. Maintaining consistent injection volumes with limited carryover and discrimination are crucial for success. Agilent offers a wide selection of chromatography syringes and replacement needles for a variety of different sample matrices and phases, all designed specifically for use with Agilent instrumentation. Our analytical syringes & replacement needles can predictably deliver accurate and precise sample volumes into the mobile phase for proper sample introduction onto the analytical column, while withstanding potentially harsh chemical and temperature interactions. For more help choosing the right syringe for your application, check out our syringe selection tool below.

title: Chromatography Vials, Caps & Septa
name: A comprehensive range of chromatography vials for your precious samples
description: Chromatography vials are containers used to transport your sample matrix to the instrument prior to injection. Agilent offers a broad range of chromatography vials in a variety of volumes, material compositions, and closure types to meet the specific needs of a wide range of applications. The design of Agilent vials, inclusive of form, fit and function, enables the wide compatibility of our vials with various autosamplers. Our portfolio includes clear glass vials for your general use and amber vial for applications involving light sensitive sample analytes. Our complete range of glass chromatography vials are made from Type 1 borosilicate glass which is compatibility with the widest range of sample matrices including acidic, neutral or alkaline pHs. The high-quality materials in use can minimize extractables leeching from the glass and interfering with the analytes of interest. Agilent vial cap and septa are manufacturing with a multi-stage curing process reducing septum bleeding leading to cleaner background chromatography for improved sample measurement.

title: Clinical Flow Cytometry
name: Clinical Flow Cytometry
description: Clinical flow cytometry is typically routinely used for cancer diagnosis classification from blood samples, and other clinical uses. The clinical Agilent flow cytometers allow clinics to generate high quality data and to process samples more quickly and efficiently, saving time and money.

title: Clinical Microplate Instrumentation
name: Automated Clinical Microplate Instruments Drive Efficiency in Your Workflows
description: Clinical microplate instrumentation provides high efficiency and performance for your clinical diagnostic workflows. From ELISA microplate readers to multimode readers, Agilent BioTek microplate instruments are designed for ease of use in setup and operation, while providing powerful analysis for quick, high-quality results.

title: Community Design (Microarrays)
name: Microarray innovation powered by you
description: Agilent Community Design Microarrays are custom microarrays developed by or in collaboration with experts in various research areas such as cytogenetics, microbiome, translational research, model organism, and much more. These custom microarray designs are now available to all as catalog, made-to-order designs. They are powered by Agilent SurePrint technology, the industry leading platform for long, high-quality oligo microarrays for CGH, gene expression, miRNA and more. Agilent has not performed verification and validation on these designs.

title: Companion Diagnostics
name: Companion Diagnostics
description: Our Companion Diagnostic solutions are a portfolio of assays and services that lead to optimal diagnostic results. Correct results the first time help select the right therapy for each patient – every time. Companion Diagnostics are all about personalized medicine Our Companion Diagnostic assays and services make a difference to the assessment of patient treatment. Correct results the first time lead to fewer reruns and will help select the right therapy for each patient – every time. We help improve patient care by delivering fast results with great confidence and reducing time from biopsy to diagnosis.

title: CRISPR
name: Achieve Your Research Goals with Agilent CRISPR Solutions
description: Accelerate your CRISPR research with our genome editing solutions ranging from SureGuide Purified chemically synthesized sgRNA to pooled screens utilizing the Agilent SurePrint Oligonucleotide Library Synthesis platform. Identify targets using either genome-scale pooled CRISPR libraries or focused, customizable pooled screens. Continue investigation and characterization of your identified targets from the pooled screen with Agilent’s reliable and efficient chemically synthesized single-guide RNAs (sgRNA). Leverage our expertise in nucleic acid synthesis and patented stabilizing chemical modifications to interrogate gene function with SureGuide Purified CRISPR sgRNA for quick and easy editing that generates consistent and reproducible results.

title: Disintegration Testing
name: Fast and Simple Disintegration Testing for Reliable, Compliant Results
description: The disintegration test is an important quality control process that helps ensure that the proper manufacturing controls are in place. Agilent offers robust systems to accurately measure the disintegration of dosage forms into particles under standard conditions. The Agilent 100 automated disintegration apparatus is a fully programmable solution that delivers reliable disintegration testing results. Our disintegration testing systems are compact and easy to manage, featuring precise temperature control and meeting regulatory compliance requirements.

title: Dissolution & Disintegration Testing Supplies
name: View supplies for dissolution and disintegration testing.
description: Agilent offers disintegration supplies, including beakers and basket rack assemblies in both standard and verified versions and dissolution supplies from standard system components such as shafts, paddles, baskets, cannula filters, and vessels to more specialized accessories such as intrinsic dissolution tools.

title: Dissolution Testing
name: Superior Pharmaceutical Research and Testing with Dissolution Technology
description: Agilent offers laboratories the pharmaceutical dissolution testing apparatus, dissolution accessories, and dissolution software for efficient and reliable dosage form testing. Extensive dissolution skills training is also offered to meet the needs of all busy laboratory analysts. Feel confident with Agilent dissolution testing apparatuses. All systems meet the international harmonized guidance requirements defined by USP, EP, CP, IPC, and JP for effective drug dosage form testing. Laboratory analysts can efficiently meet data integrity requirements too. Working to Title 21 Code of Federal Regulations (CFR) part 11 compliance standards is readily achieved using Agilent dissolution testing software.

title: Electrochemistry Meters
name: Precise electrochemistry meters for accurate pH and conductivity measurements
description: Elevate your laboratory’s analytical capabilities with our state-of-the-art Benchtop Electrochemistry Meter. Designed for precision and ease of use, this versatile instrument is perfect for a wide range of electrochemical measurements, including pH and ion concentration.

title: In Situ Hybridization
name: In Situ Hybridization
description: Fluorescence and Chromogenic In Situ Hybridization (FISH and CISH) techniques are used to localize specific nucleic acid sequences within the DNA in cells in tissues or cytological preparations, on chromosomes or in whole mounts. We provide a wide variety of probes and kits aimed at the most predominant molecular slide-based tests performed in anatomic pathology. The IQFISH hybridization buffer is formamide-free and allows genomic DNA probe hybridization to be performed in Hybridizer outside a fume hood or in Dako Omnis in just 1-2 hours. The short hybridization time results in a turnaround time of about 4 hours for a complete FISH staining or about 5 hours for a complete CISH staining on formalin-fixed, paraffin-embedded tissue sections from deparaffinization to mounting.

title: FISH Probes
name: Oligonucleotide–based FISH Probes
description: Agilent’s unique SureFISH DNA FISH probes are designed in silico and chemically synthesized using the company’s high-fidelity, oligonucleotide library synthesis (OLS) technology. This eliminates the limitations of FISH probes manufactured with bacterial artificial chromosome (BAC) technology. Agilent is the only DNA FISH probe supplier that does not use BAC technology in probe manufacturing. Agilent offers three types of probes: break apart, dual fusion, and copy number. The probes consist of a mix of two child probes (3’ and 5’ probes) combined in a single tube, each labeled in a different color (orange-red Cy3 and green FITC) and designed to target a given gene.

title: FISH Probes
name: SureFISH Probes
description:
Agilent’s unique SureFISH DNA FISH probes are designed in silico and chemically synthesized using the company’s high-fidelity, oligonucleotide library synthesis (OLS) technology. This eliminates the limitations of FISH probes manufactured with bacterial artificial chromosome (BAC) technology. Agilent is the only comprehensive DNA FISH probe supplier that does not use BAC technology in probe manufacturing.

Achieving a robust signal and minimal background, often referred to as high signal-to-noise ratio, can be one of the main challenges that is encountered when implementing a FISH assay. Using in silico design methods to eliminate repetitive elements ensure that our chemically synthesized SureFISH probes offer our customers the highest quality. To ensure that every SureFISH probe is truly repeat-free and will produce clean signal, each oligo is sequence-compared to the entire human genome to verify target specificity. All nonspecific sequences are removed. Thus, SureFISH probes eliminate the need for blocking and the signal suppression produced by blocking agents. Use the filters in the table below to find the SureFISH probes you need.

title: Gas Chromatography
name: Gas Chromatography (GC) Solutions to Optimize Your Workflow
description: Gas chromatography (GC) helps scientists ensure the safety, quality, and purity of our food, air, water, and pharmaceuticals; determine the composition and consistency of fuels and chemicals; and test for controlled substances in criminal investigations and sporting competitions. Agilent gas chromatography systems combine innovative technology, Instrument Intelligence, and legendary reliability to meet the needs of analytical testing and research laboratories across a broad range of applications, such as environmental, food safety, forensics, energy & chemicals, and more. Integrated Instrument Intelligence helps avoid GC problems before they affect chromatographic performance to optimize uptime, cost of ownership, and confidence in results.

title: Gas Chromatography/Mass Spectrometry (GC/MS)
name: Gas Chromatography/Mass Spectrometry (GC/MS)
description: Agilent has led innovation and performance in gas chromatography/mass spectrometry (GC/MS) for over 40 years, from the first Agilent benchtop GC/MS through to the MS/MS-capable GC/Q-TOF dedicated to gas chromatography. The Agilent gas chromatography/mass spectrometry family of instruments and accessories provides the efficiency, flexibility, and robust performance that modern analytical laboratories require. Advances in ion source technology further enhance GC/MS robustness, and GC/MS libraries and analyzers allow you to quickly set up a gas chromatography/mass spectrometry method for simplified startup of specific applications.

title: Gas Purification & Gas Management
name: Supplies for delivering clean gases to instruments
description: Agilent offers a wide range of gas management & gas purification supplies for delivering clean gases to GC and GC/MS instruments. Clean carrier gas and detector gas streams are critical to the quality of your analytical results and lab safety. Agilent’s GC gas management & purification supplies can ensure a clean and leak-free GC workflow from source to detection without introducing contaminants. Our portfolio includes precision engineered purifiers, flow meters, leak detectors, fittings, and tubing, which ensures reproducible results and dependable performance, regardless of your instrument platform. The gas purifiers deliver clean gases, preventing shortened column lifetime, sensitivity loss, and instrument downtime. The innovative CrossLab CS two in one cartridge system for leak detectors and flow meters will provide everything you need for GC troubleshooting.

title: GC Columns and Supplies, GC/MS Supplies
name: Access columns, supplies, and consumables for GC and GC/MS instruments.
description: Agilent offers a complete portfolio of supplies and consumables for Gas Chromatography (GC) and Gas Chromatography/Mass Spec (GC/MS) instruments, including GC columns, ferrules, inlet liners, septa, vials, chemical standards, syringes, needles, sample prep products. Our precision-engineered supplies ensure reproducibility of results and dependable performance.

title: Gene Expression Microarray Platform
name: Gene Expression Microarray Platform
description: Learn about our Gene Expression Microarray Platform for your workflows and research. We provide a complete platform from sample to results, including Gene Expression & Exon Microarrays, Buffers, Kits & Reagents, Scanners & Equipment, Software, and Supplies. Our gene expression microarrays include whole transcriptome gene expression for almost 30 different species, Exon microarrays to analyze splicing variants and expression microarrays with comprehensive content, including full LNCipedia databases for full coverage of the transcriptome in a single experiment. This platform also offers all reagents needed to successfully process your microarrays, delivering reliable and reproducible results.

title: GPC/SEC Columns & Standards
name: GPC & SEC columns & standards for polymer & plastic analysis in aqueous, organic, and polar solvents.
description: Agilent gel permeation chromatography (GPC) and size exclusion chromatography (SEC) columns and standards have been the top-selling in the polymer industry for decades. GPC and SEC is used to determine the molecular weight and size distribution of macromolecules. SEC and GPC columns generate accurate, reliable data for critical polymer parameters, including dispersity (PDI), molecular weight mass average (Mw), number average (Mn), and z-average (Mz). GPC/SEC columns can be used with organic, aqueous, and polar solvents. GPC/SEC columns offered include PLgel, PL aquagel-OH, PolarGel, SUPREMA, NOVEMA Max, and GRAM. Manufactured using ISO 9001 certification, GPC/SEC standards are traceable with a unique batch number and a certificate of analysis. The 2022 acquisition of Polymer Standards Service (PSS) expanded Agilent's offerings for gel permeation chromatography (GPC) and size exclusion chromatography (SEC) polymer analysis. The acquisition broadened Agilent’s portfolio and offerings for the analysis of natural and synthetic polymers, including both GPC and SEC columns and standards.

title: Hematoxylin & Eosin
name: Hematoxylin & Eosin
description: Our state-of-the-art H&E solution fully automates every step of the hematoxylin and eosin staining process. Providing the operational flexibility to meet laboratories' special needs, it delivers consistent, high-quality results while maximizing productivity and optimizing resource utilization. It is the efficient, safe and accurate choice for H&E. Our H&E solution combines the advanced Dako CoverStainer with ready-to-use reagents, a validated, optimized protocol, and features - an intelligent, automated reagent handling system (DakoRMS).

title: Automated H&E Staining
name: Automated H&E Staining
description: Dako CoverStainer is a fully automated H&E working station that covers: Baking → Dewaxing → Staining → Dehydration → Coverslipping → Drying. Featuring fully automated and flexible operation, Dako CoverStainer provides the H&E solution laboratories can count on for accurate results, streamlined workflow, and enhanced productivity.

title: H&E Reagents
name: Ready-to-Use Reagents for H&E staining
description: Ready-to-use H&E reagents offer both regressive and progressive staining options, giving you the ability to choose the intensity that you prefer and achieve staining consistency over 3,000 slides or 5 days’ usage. Combined with Dako CoverStainer and the validated H&E protocols, our reagents help reduce manual processes and streamline workflow. Easy-to-use, prefilled reagent bottles minimize spills for greater safety and storage in closed containers eliminates evaporation so reagents last longer.

title: HPLC and UHPLC Columns for Small Molecule Separations
name: Small Molecule HPLC Columns
description:
High-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC) columns for small molecule analysis separate your analytes of interest in a wide range of compounds. Agilent offers the largest, most modern HPLC and UHPLC column portfolios for small molecule analysis, with columns suitable for nearly all separation modes and applications. Whether you are performing conventional or ultra-fast chromatography, separating biomolecules, or analyzing complex compounds, the industry’s highest-performing compounds deliver fast, reproducible results – all engineered with unparalleled quality and reliability. The small molecule column HPLC column portfolio includes state-of-the-art superficially porous InfinityLab Poroshell 120 HPLC columns as well as traditional fully porous ZORBAX, Polaris, and Pursuit HPLC columns.

When you choose Agilent small molecule HPLC columns, you get more than just a dependable product. You also get unmatched technical support from the world’s largest chromatography supplier.

description: Discover the largest portfolio of high-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC) and ultra-high-performance liquid chromatography (UHPLC) columns. title: Sample Preparation for Analytical Chemistry
name: Ensure Confident Results with Sample Preparation
description: Sample preparation, or sample prep, is an essential part of chromatographic and spectroscopic analyses. The purpose of sample prep is to convert the sample into a form suitable for analysis without significant loss of target compounds. Proper sample preparation removes potentially interfering contamination, which extends the lifetime of your chromatography column and other instrument components. Agilent’s suite of sample preparation products ensure you have the right product for your needs. Our purification and filtration products provide quick and reliable results for repeated analyses and are ideal for busy, high-throughput laboratories. Pre-packaged QuEChERS extraction and dispersive solid phase extraction (dSPE) kits are ideal for food samples and accommodate AOAC and EN methodologies. We also offer a full portfolio of solid supported liquid extraction (SLE), solid phase extraction (SPE), and solid phase microextraction (SPME) products in various chemistries and formats to achieve excellent performance and ensure samples are free of interferences, even with complex matrices.

name: Explore our complete portfolio of HPLC columns for bio, SEC, and more.
description: Discover the largest portfolio of high-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC) and ultra-high-performance liquid chromatography (UHPLC) columns. HPLC and UHPLC column types include bio columns, columns for small molecule separations, gel permeation chromatography (GPC) and size exclusion chromatography (SEC) columns. Find the best (U)HPLC column for your application from Agilent's reliable and high-quality selection. A broad range of standards are also available.

title: In Situ Hybridization
name: In Situ Hybridization
description: Fluorescence and Chromogenic In Situ Hybridization (FISH and CISH) techniques are used to localize specific nucleic acid sequences within the DNA in cells in tissues or cytological preparations, on chromosomes or in whole mounts. We provide a wide variety of probes and kits aimed at the most predominant molecular slide-based tests performed in anatomic pathology. The IQFISH hybridization buffer is formamide-free and allows genomic DNA probe hybridization to be performed in Hybridizer outside a fume hood or in Dako Omnis in just 1-2 hours. The short hybridization time results in a turnaround time of about 4 hours for a complete FISH staining or about 5 hours for a complete CISH staining on formalin-fixed, paraffin-embedded tissue sections from deparaffinization to mounting.

title: ISH Ancillaries & Accessories
name: ISH Ancillaries & Accessories
description: The ISH Ancillaries & Accessories section consists of accessory kits, single reagents, detection systems and devices designed for optimal performance of FISH and CISH probes on cytological specimens and formalin-fixed, paraffin-embedded (FFPE) tissue sections. The products support FISH and CISH probes for manual use as well as for use on Dako Omnis.

title: J&W GC Columns
name: Ensure accurate peak identification & quantification for GC analysis with J&W GC Columns.
description: Gas Chromatography (GC) columns are at the heart of the gas chromatograph and responsible for the separation process. GC is one of the most important and critical tools in analytical chemistry, because of its effectiveness, sensitivity and ease-of-use. GC columns contain a stationary phase, typically a polymeric material. It is through the interaction between the analytes and this stationary phase within the column that separation of the analyte into their molecular components can occur. There are two types of GC columns: packed columns and capillary columns. Agilent offers over 3500 J&W GC columns. GC column types include fused-silica capillary wall-coated open tubular (WCOT), porous-layer open tubular (PLOT), and packed columns with the best inertness for acids/bases/mixed functional compounds, the lowest bleed levels and tightest column-to-column reproducibility. The J&W 5Q columns combine industry-leading Ultra Inert performance with Ultra Low-Bleed technology, delivering the new standard for GC/MS column performance and productivity. Ultra Low Bleed Q columns are compatible with any GC/MS system to ensure a seamless fit.

title: Lab Consumables
name: Access lab consumables, including sample prep, standards, vials, and more.
description: Agilent offers a comprehensive range of lab consumables designed to work across workflows and instruments, including chemical standards, sample preparation products, syringes & needles, autosampler vials. Agilent consumables are designed for optimal performance and reproducibility.

title: Supplies and Consumables
name: Explore our comprehensive portfolio of columns and supplies for HPLC, GC, and spectroscopy instruments.
description: Discover the largest portfolio of columns, supplies, and consumables for high-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC), gas chromatography (GC), and spectroscopy instruments. Our comprehensive portfolio includes chromatography columns, instrument supplies, chemical standards, sample prep products, syringes & needles, and vials. Agilent consumables are designed for optimal performance and consistency across multiple runs.

title: Supplies and Consumables
name: Explore our comprehensive portfolio of columns and supplies for HPLC, GC, and spectroscopy instruments.
description: Discover the largest portfolio of columns, supplies, and consumables for high-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC), gas chromatography (GC), and spectroscopy instruments. Our comprehensive portfolio includes chromatography columns, instrument supplies, chemical standards, sample prep products, syringes & needles, and vials. Agilent consumables are designed for optimal performance and consistency across multiple runs.

title: Liquid Chromatography
name: HPLC and UHPLC Solutions for Efficient Analysis and Reliable Results
description: Discover Agilent InfinityLab LC solutions that include instruments, columns, consumables, software, and supplies. From routine analysis to cutting-edge scientific research, the InfinityLab LC Series offers the broadest portfolio of HPLC and UHPLC systems to deliver great science with any budget. Agilent HPLC and UHPLC systems with modular configurations provide flexibility for best choice and optimal operational efficiency. When you chose to invest in Agilent HPLC, you can rely on reliable liquid chromatography instruments and comprehensive services, designed to maximize laboratory uptime.

title: HPLC & UHPLC Systems
name: Discover HPLC and UHPLC Instruments Suitable for Every Application
description: Explore our reliable HPLC and UHPLC systems. Great scientific breakthroughs and QA/QC routine analysis that meet productivity goals need dependable chromatography instruments. Our wide range of affordable and advanced Agilent HPLC and UHPLC instruments deliver the performance, reliability, and robustness you need for the highest confidence in your daily results. But confidence isn’t enough. Improving productivity, increasing efficiency, and maximizing return on investment are key to your scientific excellence and success. Discover the ideal Agilent HPLC systems for your laboratory and analytical scientists needs.

title: HPLC Components & Accessories
name: HPLC Devices and Accessories to Achieve Optimal Performance and Efficiency
description: Seamlessly combine Agilent Infinity II HPLC and UHPLC devices and dedicated accessories for the best solution and to achieve highest operational efficiency.

title: HPLC & CE Software
name: HPLC Software and LC Drivers for Powerful and Flexible Instrument Control
description: Ensure convenient and intuitive operation of Agilent HPLC and UHPLC hardware with powerful chromatography data systems. Leverage LC and CE drivers, the core of our CDS, to control your Agilent HPLC systems and workflow solutions.

title: HPLC/UHPLC Upgrades
name: Upgrade your HPLC/UHPLC instruments and components for the highest performance
description: Every Agilent HPLC and UHPLC system is unrivaled when it comes to performance and confidence in your day-to-day HPLC analysis. What’s more, every analytical scientist has different needs and expectations from their HPLC instruments. That’s why we offer various hardware upgrades and software packages to help you get the most of your Agilent instruments. All upgrades and enhancements are all tailored to your needs, so that you can boost your HPLC’s performance and utility. Upgrade your existing HPLC pumps, injectors, column compartments, detectors, and software to help your lab achieve highest operational efficiency.

title: Liquid Chromatography/Mass Spectrometry (LC/MS)
name: Liquid Chromatography/Mass Spectrometry (LC/MS)
description: Agilent liquid chromatography/mass spectrometry (LC/MS) brings powerful analytical capability to a wide range of applications. Complete LC/MS workflows feature sample preparation, InfinityLab chromatography, and Agilent mass spectrometry, as well as software to acquire high-quality data and turn it into definitive answers. The Agilent family of liquid chromatography/mass spectrometry instruments provides the versatility and performance to solve virtually any analytical challenge. A broad selection of ion sources enables the most flexible detection for the variety of compound classes amenable to HPLC separation and beyond. Powerful software along with curated compound databases and libraries allow you to quickly set up an LC/MS or LC/MS/MS method for your specific application.

title: Microarray Processing
name: Microarray Processing
description: Learn about our selection of Microarray Scanners & Equipment for your research workflows. It includes the SureScan Microarray Scanner, software and accessories. Accessories include software, backing slides, hybridization chambers, microarray hybridization ovens, hybridization oven accessories, and stabilization & drying solutions. The SureScan Microarray Scanner is the foundation of our complete microarray solution that offers outstanding sensitivity and resolution, delivering flexibility to analyze genomics and cytogenetics microarrays. The small footprint of the SureScan Microarray Scanner allows lab space to be optimized while improving the sensitivity and maintaining the broadest dynamic range. Read on to find more about our microarray scanners.

title: Microplates
name: A microplate for any workflow
description: Agilent microplate technology increases the efficiency of parallel processing large numbers of biological and chemical samples and reactions. Agilent has more than 35 years of experience providing quality microplates to pharmaceutical, biotechnical, agricultural, toxicological, forensics, government, industrial, and academic institutions. The standard microplate product portfolio includes extensive options for filtration and collection, short-term and long-term sample storage, assay performance, as well as microplate reading and imaging. These microplates are easily adaptable for high-throughput applications with the use of automated workstations, as well as manual pipetting workflows. They are ideal for purification, sample preparation, cellular assays, compound storage, and many other applications. In addition, our custom design and manufacturing capabilities deliver unique products to OEM, assay kit, and instrument manufacturers.

title: Microscopes and Microplate Instrumentation
name: Automated Microplate Imagers, Readers, and Liquid Handlers Deliver Productivity
description: Agilent BioTek instrumentation is engineered to facilitate your workflows, increase your laboratory efficiency, and to enable a broad range of life science applications. Your science will benefit from the ease of use, powerful data and image capture and processing, and all the steps between with our range of automated imagers, multimode readers, washers, dispensers and automation platforms. Modularity and upgradability are the hallmarks of accessibility to improved workflows for laboratories and applications of all types, and Agilent BioTek microplate instrumentation provides remarkable configurability and quality to suit your budget and applications now and well into the future.

title: miRNA Microarray Platform
name: miRNA Microarray Platform
description: Learn about our complete miRNA Microarray Platform. It includes everything you need from sample to analyzed data: Microarrays, Reagents, Scanner & Software. The Agilent SurePrint miRNA Microarrays provide a unique way to analyze your samples, thanks to a proprietary probe design and labeling method: miRNAs are directly labelled, limiting processing bias and providing optimal sensitivity & specificity. We provide catalog microarrays for human, mouse and rat and the ability to customize content using our database of probes spanning more than 250 species. The platform offers all reagents needed to process the microarrays delivering reliable and reproducible results. Our software and scanners ensure outstanding optimization of your arrays. Learn more.

title: Molecular Spectroscopy
name: Molecular Spectroscopy Portfolio Offers Performance, Accuracy and Flexibility
description: Agilent’s best-in-class portfolio of molecular spectroscopy instruments have grown in breadth as well as capabilities. With leading innovations like the Cary 3500 UV-Vis and laser direct infrared (LDIR) chemical imaging, through to the 4300 handheld FTIR and our proprietary spatially offset and transmission Raman technologies, our spectroscopy systems are more qualified than ever to equip you with the right solution for your specific challenge.

title: Multiple Affinity Removal System (MARS)
name: Multiple Affinity Removal System (MARS)
description: The Agilent Multiple Affinity Removal Spin Columns and Cartridges are designed to chromatographically remove interfering high-abundance proteins and biomarkers found in serum, plasma, and other biological fluids. The removal of these abundant proteins improves subsequent LC/MS and electrophoretic analysis by effectively expanding the dynamic range of the assay. The system is available in various LC column dimensions and in a spin cartridge format. These columns and cartridges complement our optimized buffers, spin filters, and concentrators to deliver an automated, integrated depletion solution. The cartridges are suitable for benchtop centrifuges and the columns are compatible with most LC instruments, including the Agilent 1200/1100 systems.

title: Mutagenesis & Cloning
name: Extensive range of classic and next generation Mutagenesis and Cloning products
description: Agilent’s Mutagenesis and Cloning portfolio includes the fastest and latest generation kits, competent cells, vectors, and enzymes to help forward your research for any downstream applications. Our kits speed up the protocol for performing site-directed or random mutagenesis, with high efficiency and 100% accuracy and reliability. Our extensive cloning vectors include the latest in next-generation cloning, and are designed to simplify commonly used or difficult cloning and sequencing procedures, with high speed, reliability and precision. Our broad line of competent cells includes innovative strains for every cloning strategy.

title: Cloning Vectors & Kits
name: Cloning Vectors and Kits from specialty to the latest in next generation cloning.
description: Learn about our cloning vector systems and kits, from specialty to the latest in next generation custom vectors. Our DNA cloning vectors simplify commonly used cloning procedures and improve yields and sequencing throughput. Our PCR cloning kits deliver rapid and high efficiency cloning. SureVector is the latest innovation in next-generation cloning to create custom vectors for any application. Fast and flexible, the SureVector system harnesses the power of synthetic biology by allowing the combination of standard validated parts to create novel vector constructs. It also enables reliable assembly of custom plasmids for mammalian, E. coli, and yeast cells by combining Agilent's functional DNA modules with custom genes and components.

title: Competent Cells & Competent Cell Supplies
name: Competent, electrocompetent and chemically competent cells for any application
description: The right competent cells are critical to the success of your workflows, be it general protein expression or cloning, difficult cloning, or expressing toxic proteins. Find the best option for your applications from our extensive and innovative selection of competent cells, electrocompetent or chemically competent cells. This include strains with the highest transformation efficiencies available, especially useful when cloning large plasmids. Our competent cells come in convenient packaging designed to satisfy higher throughput requirements. For ultimate convenience we offer custom configurations, formulations, and packaging options.

title: Enzymes, Inhibitors & Kits
name: Enzymes, inhibitors and kits for your applications
description: Find the right enzymatic solution for your workflows from our selection of high quality enzymes, inhibitors, and kits. Agilent has DNA/RNA modification enzymes, DNA ligation kits, restriction enzymes, and luminescent peel-off stickers for marking and aligning autoradiographs. Our DNA ligation kits contain the reagents needed to perform both sticky and blunt-end ligations at optimal ligation efficiency. Restriction enzymes come with optimal or Universal buffer for double-digest reactions. The DNA/RNA modifying enzyme kits deliver components for performing a large variety of applications, including partial or complete fill-ins, digestion of protein in biological samples and facilitation of site-directed mutagenesis reactions.

title: Mutagenesis Kits
name: Fast and efficient mutagenesis kits for any application
description: Agilent offers high-efficiency mutagenesis kits for any application. The fastest and latest generation of QuikChange site-directed mutagenesis kits contain specially engineered enzymes to speed up the protocol for performing single and multiple site-directed mutagenesis to less than 3 hours, letting you rapidly create point mutations, amino acid substitutions, insertions and deletions in virtually any double-stranded plasmid. The GeneMorph II Random Mutagenesis Kits are formulated to produce a more uniform mutational spectrum when performing error prone PCR to achieve random mutagenesis. The GeneMorph II EZClone Domain Mutagenesis Kit offers an easy method to perform targeted random mutagenesis on protein domains and promoter elements.

title: Next Generation Sequencing
name: Next-generation sequencing solutions from sample to analysis
description: Empower your genomic analysis with Agilent’s comprehensive portfolio of next-generation sequencing (NGS) solutions. Featuring Agilent SureSelect and Avida library preparation and target enrichment reagents, our connected solutions offer reliable data and insights. Easy integration with advanced automation, sample QC platforms, and data analysis software ensure that each step in the NGS workflow is optimized for accuracy and efficiency.

title: NGS Library Prep & Target Enrichment Reagents
name: Library Prep and Target Enrichment Reagents for NGS
description: Maximize your samples’ potential with Agilent’s library prep and target enrichment chemistry, designed for optimal performance in DNA, RNA, and methylation sequencing (DNA-, RNA-, and Methyl-Seq) workflows. The SureSelect reagents portfolio provides a streamlined and flexible workflow with comprehensive features for various NGS applications, including Exome and oncology. The Avida reagents drive productivity and reproducibility to support high sensitivity applications such as liquid biopsy, multi-omics analysis, and low input samples to advance oncology research.

title: NGS Assays & Panels
name: Expert-Designed NGS Assays and Panels
description: Enable precise and efficient genomic analyses tailored to your unique NGS applications using catalog and custom designed panels. Our diverse range of curated panels harness the expertise of subject matter experts from oncology and infectious disease to epigenetics. These highly sensitive NGS panels easily integrate with SureSelect and Avida target enrichment technologies to help unlock insight into targeted genomic regions.

title: NGS Automation Platforms
name: Automation Solutions for the NGS Workflow
description: Drive productivity and reproducibility for NGS library preparation and target enrichment with Agilent automation platforms, including hardware, software, and reagents, in a comprehensive and versatile workflow. The Agilent Magnis NGS Prep system and Agilent Bravo NGS platforms provide flexible and scalable automation to support a range of genomics applications, including Exome, Oncology, Community Design and Custom. The workflow is enhanced with optimized SureSelect protocols and analysis software.

title: Oligo Pools & Oligo GMP Manufacturing
name: Your Partner in Oligo Pools and Oligo GMP Manufacturing
description: SurePrint pooled oligo synthesis is an optimized parallel DNA synthesis platform that uses microfluidic DNA writing technology to produce oligo pools with industry leading fidelity and uniformity. Our platform incorporates stringent process monitoring quality control and runs in continuous 24/7 operation for production of completely custom oligo pools in rapid turn-around-times. As a contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO), our cGMP facilities produce clinical-grade oligonucleotide material for human therapeutics. We manufacture across a range of scales, from grams to kilograms of siRNA, antisense, aptamers, gRNA, etc. Scale your processes with Agilent from clinical trials through commercialization.

title: Oligonucleotide GMP Manufacturing
name: Accelerate Oligos from Clinic to Market
description: Partnering with Agilent, an experienced contract development and manufacturing organization, will give you the confidence that your clinical and commercial oligonucleotide API will meet appropriate specifications, quality, and purity requirements. In two state-of-the art cGMP facilities in Colorado, U.S., Agilent produces grams to kilograms of siRNA, antisense, aptamers, sgRNA, and other oligos. We are expanding capacity to take on more programs, increase batch sizes, and address our partners' needs more quickly. Agilent supports several commercial programs, so you can rely on our expertise throughout clinical trials and commercialization. Accelerate speed to clinic and market, scale chemical processes, and produce high-quality oligo API with us.

title: Pooled Oligo Synthesis
name: Uncover new targets by performing pooled screens with SurePrint Oligo Pools
description: Agilent SurePrint pooled oligo synthesis is an advanced and high throughput production scale parallel DNA synthesis platform that has been continuously improved on and optimized over the course of 25 years of innovation. We use state-of-the-art microfluidic DNA writing technology in a continuous 24/7 operation for production of completely custom oligo pools in rapid turn-around-times. Your research deserves the best starting material. SurePrint oligo pools incorporate stringent process monitoring quality control for high consistency alongside exceptional fidelity and uniformity. We make oligo pools that meet unique requirements for applications in protein engineering, directed evolution, gene assembly, pooled CRISPR screening and more.

title: Polymerase Chain Reaction (PCR)
name: Polymerase Chain Reaction (PCR) Products Accelerate Research for Quality Results.
description: Agilent’s PCR portfolio helps you obtain quality results more rapidly. These include PCR enzymes and master mixes, kits and reagents, nucleic acid purification and isolation kits, reference and controls, and various PCR plastics and supplies.

title: Cloning & PCR Detection Kits
name: PCR Enzymes and Master Mixes for All Your PCR Needs and the Best Results
description: A wide variety of PCR polymerases and reagents, PCR-based specialty kits and reagents, PCR inhibitors, and cloning kits to serve your PCR DNA amplification needs.

title: PCR Enzymes & Reagents
name: PCR Enzymes and Reagents for Speed, Specificity, Yield, and Fidelity
description: Polymerase chain reaction (PCR) enzymes and reagents provide a wide variety of routine, high-fidelity, and Hotstart transcription enzymes for all your PCR needs. These products support features such as reverse transcriptase cloning, cDNA from an RNA template, and high-fidelity cloning.

title: PCR Nucleic Acid Purification & Isolation Kits
name: PCR Nucleic Acid Purification and Isolation Kits Help You Get Better Results.

title: PCR Plastics & Supplies
name: PCR Plastics and Supplies for Your PCR System
description: Find all your polymerase chain reaction plastics and supplies here. Our range includes tube racks, tube strip caps, tube strips, well plate supplies, well plates, tubes, StrataCooler, and StrataCooler accessories.

title: Protein Expression
name: Protein Expression Solutions
description: Agilent’s protein expression solutions provide a comprehensive line of competent cells, vectors, antibodies, antibiotics, transfection reagents, and specialty kits for protein expression and purification applications. Agilent competent cells for routine protein expression feature strains optimized for high transformation efficiencies. These strains provide easy induction and the highest levels of recombinant protein expression in E. coli. Agilent also offers a comprehensive collection of competent cells for difficult protein expression, including strains to solve expression difficulties such as toxic proteins, insoluble proteins, and codon bias. These competent cells also provide the highest levels of recombinant protein expression in E. coli. Agilent’s protein expression vectors and kits offer a large selection of products for any application you can imagine, from novel vectors for bacterial, mammalian, or yeast protein expression to our complete kits for path detection, inducible tagged expression, viral based gene delivery and expression, and purification to recover interacting proteins. Agilent protein expression transfection reagents & kits are optimized for efficient, rapid and simplified transfection of mammalian cells and include all necessary reagents and protocols. We offer a variety of reliable transfection reagents and kits to suit your specific transfection needs and optimized to your cell culture conditions. In addition, Agilent offers a selection of antibiotics and antibodies to use with our Protein Expression systems and kits.

title: Competent Cells for Difficult Protein Expression
name: Competent Cells for Difficult Protein Expression
description: Agilent offers a comprehensive collection of competent cells for difficult protein expression, including specialty strains for a large variety of applications. These competent cells provide the highest levels of recombinant protein expression in E. coli. The BL21-CodonPlus cells dramatically improve protein expression in E. coli by overcoming the problem of codon bias. ArcticExpress Competent Cells are engineered to address the common bacterial gene expression hurdle of protein insolubility. With our cold-adapted ArticExpress RIL and ArcticExpress RP Competent Cell lines, you can enhance protein solubility and correct for codon bias at the same time. BL21 and BL21-Gold strains provide the tightest control of protein expression for extremely toxic proteins.

title: Competent Cells for Routine Protein Expression
name: Competent Cells for Routine Protein Expression
description: Agilent competent cells for routine protein expression feature strains optimized for high transformation efficiencies. These strains provide easy induction and the highest levels of recombinant protein expression in E. coli.

title: Protein Expression Antibodies & Antibiotics
name: Antibodies & Antibiotics for Protein Expression
description: Agilent offers a selection of antibiotics and antibodies to use with our Protein Expression systems and kits. These include our Anti-FLAG antibodies for the detection of FLAG-tagged proteins and peptides, the anti-c-Myc monoclonal antibody for the detection of c-Myc and c-Myc-tagged proteins, and the Vitality hrGFP monoclonal antibody for the detection of wild type humanized Renilla Green Fluorescent Protein as well as N- and C-terminal fusions to this protein. Our antibiotics products feature Hygromycin B and G418 Sulfate. Hygromycin B is an antibiotic that kills bacteria, fungi and higher eukaryotic cells by inhibiting protein synthesis and selects for eukaryotic cells stably transfected with hygromycin-b resistant genes. G418 blocks polypeptide synthesis by inhibiting the elongation step in both prokaryotic and eukaryotic cells and selects for neomycin-resistant genes.

title: Protein Expression Antibodies & Antibiotics
name: Antibodies & Antibiotics for Protein Expression
description: Agilent offers a selection of antibiotics and antibodies to use with our Protein Expression systems and kits. These include our Anti-FLAG antibodies for the detection of FLAG-tagged proteins and peptides, the anti-c-Myc monoclonal antibody for the detection of c-Myc and c-Myc-tagged proteins, and the Vitality hrGFP monoclonal antibody for the detection of wild type humanized Renilla Green Fluorescent Protein as well as N- and C-terminal fusions to this protein. Our antibiotics products feature Hygromycin B and G418 Sulfate. Hygromycin B is an antibiotic that kills bacteria, fungi and higher eukaryotic cells by inhibiting protein synthesis and selects for eukaryotic cells stably transfected with hygromycin-b resistant genes. G418 blocks polypeptide synthesis by inhibiting the elongation step in both prokaryotic and eukaryotic cells and selects for neomycin-resistant genes.

title: Protein Expression Purification
name: Protein Expression Purification
description: Agilent’s protein expression purification products include the original InterPlay Mammalian TAP System and the InterPlay Adenoviral TAP System, for the recovery of interacting proteins from mammalian cells. The InterPlay Mammalian TAP System allows you to recover interacting proteins from mammalian cells. The novel method is based on expression of a protein of interest fused to two affinity tags: a streptavidin binding peptide (SBP) and a calmodulin binding peptide (CBP). Tandem affinity purification yields your tagged protein and interacting proteins using gentle washing and small molecule elution conditions. You do not need protease digestion to recover interacting protein partners since SBP and CBP elute easily from their affinity resins, leaving your interacting proteins intact. The InterPlay Adenoviral TAP System combines our unique tandem affinity purification (TAP) system with our exclusive adenoviral gene delivery system, the AdEasy Adenoviral Vector System, for enhanced gene delivery to a broader range of mammalian cells, higher protein yields, and improved purification and analysis of endogenous interacting protein partners.

title: Protein Expression Transfection Reagent & Kits
name: Protein Expression Transfection Reagent & Kits
description: Agilent protein expression transfection reagents & kits are optimized for efficient, rapid and simplified transfection of mammalian cells and include all necessary reagents and protocols. We offer a variety of reliable transfection reagents and kits to suit your specific transfection needs and optimized to your cell culture conditions. The GeneJammer Transfection Reagent is a proprietary formulation of novel polyamines ideal for transient or stable transfections in a wide variety of cell types. This transfection reagent is effective in both serum-containing medium and serum-free medium, offering high efficiencies with minimal cytotoxicity. The LipoTAXI mammalian transfection reagent contains a unique, low-toxicity lipid formulation that has been tested with over 30 cell lines and has been shown to achieve high efficiency transfections with a wide variety of cells, including both adherent cells and cells growing in suspension. The MBS Mammalian Transfection kit can increase your transfection efficiencies up to 100-fold and reduce assay time. The ViraPack Transfection Kit is based on a modified CaPO4 method of DNA transfection to introduce viral plasmids into HEK293 packaging cell lines with high efficiency.

title: Protein Expression Vectors & Kits
name: Protein Expression Vectors & Kits
description: Agilent’s protein expression vectors and kits offer a large selection of products for any application you can imagine. From novel vectors for bacterial, mammalian, or yeast protein expression to our complete kits for inducible tagged expression, Agilent brings you a solution for every situation. Determine if a gene product or compound activates pathways leading to specific enhancers with the PathDetect system. The InterPlay Mammalian TAP System allows you to recover interacting proteins from mammalian cells. Viral-based gene delivery and expression systems such as AdEasy Adenoviral Vector Systems, ViraPort Retroviral Gene Expression System, and AAV Helper-Free systems provide exceptionally high-efficiency gene delivery to a broad range of hosts.

title: Real-Time PCR (qPCR)
name: Real Time PCR Systems
description: Learn about Agilent’s Real Time PCR system including the newest generation AriaMx system, and find everything you need for your qPCR applications, from kits, instruments, enzymes, master mixes, reagents, optical cartridges, plastics, supplies to software and more.  The AriaMx Real-time PCR System is a fully integrated quantitative PCR amplification, detection, and data analysis system. The AriaMx amplifies your productivity with its unique modular and flexible design, intuitive touch-screen interface, advanced, easy-to-use reporting, and 120+ attributes monitored via the built-in on-board diagnostics to help pinpoint assay or instrument issues as they arise.

title: Real-Time PCR Detection Kits
name: Real-Time PCR (qPCR) Detection Kits
description: Discover Agilent’s range of qPCR specialty kits and reagents, like the MycoSensor qPCR assay kits, the miRNA qRT-PCR detection reagents, the porcine detection kit, and the qPCR NGS library quantification kit. All our real-time PCR specialty kits and reagents are fast, efficient, and deliver high specificity. The qPCR NGS library quantification kit can measure libraries at low concentrations (one femtomolar). Our MycoSensor qPCR assay kits detect Mycoplasma infection of cell cultures in fewer than two hours, while the miRNA qRT-PCR detection kit is a high-specificity reagent system for the detection of miRNA with fast results.

title: Real-Time PCR Master Mix Reagents
name: Master Mixes for Real Time PCR Applications
description: Learn about Agilent’s range of master mixes for your real time PCR workflows. Our Brilliant Master Mix kits provide high specificity, speed and reproducibility, while the Brilliant HRM Ultra-Fast Loci Mixes enable you to mix-and-go faster with total confidence, even for the most difficult genotypes.  The Brilliant Master Mix kits come with convenient, pre-blended formulations and an enhanced rapid start capability to save time and reduce primer-dimer. The kits include novel, fast Taq mutant for qPCR results in less than 35 minutes. We also offer the Brilliant Master Mixes with ROX in low and high concentrations of ROX reference dye which help increase sensitivity of detection to low copy numbers.

title: Real-Time PCR Nucleic Acid Isolation and Purification Kits
name: Nucleic Acid Purification & Isolation Kits for qPCR Applications
description: Learn about Agilent’s range of high efficiency Real Time PCR (q PCR) Nucleic Acid Purification and Isolation kits. We offer a portfolio of specially formulated nucleic acid purification and isolation kits with all the reagents needed to make DNA and RNA extraction and purification from tissue and cell samples easy, fast and highly sensitive. Our kits include the Absolutely Total RNA Purification Kits, Absolutely Total RNA FFPE Purification Kits, Genomic DNA Isolation, Plant RNA Isolation Kits and more. Downstream applications of the kits include cDNA synthesis and labeling, microarray gene expression experiments, northern blotting, RNase protection assays and a host of other applications.

title: Real-Time PCR Plastics & Supplies
name: Real-Time PCR (qPCR) Plastics & Supplies
description: Find a selection of plastics and supplies for your qPCR experiments, including plates, tubes, caps, strips, adhesive plate seals and racks. They are validated for optimal performance with the AriaMx and AriaDx real time PCR Systems. Our well plates are compatible with the optical strip caps. The strip tubes come with and without caps. Choose the right fit, frame and size of the plastics and accessories for your qPCR experiments.

title: Real-Time PCR Starter Kits
name: Starter Kits for Real Time PCR Applications
description: The starter packs are designed for performing assays on the AriaMx real-time PCR systems and other platforms. The starter packs include cDNA synthesis kits and recommended plastics.

title: Real-Time PCR Systems
name: Real Time PCR (qPCR) instruments, accessories and software
description: Learn about Agilent’s Real Time PCR (qPCR) instruments, which deliver speed, accuracy and flexibility. The AriaDx and AriaMx instruments are fully integrated quantitative PCR amplification, detection, and data analysis systems. They amplify productivity with their unique modular and flexible design, offer users an intuitive interface, 120+ attributes monitored via the built-in on-board diagnostics to help pinpoint assay or instrument issues as they arise, accurate data analysis and easy report generation. Our qPCR instruments are tailored for gene expression analysis, genotyping/HRM capability, microarray data validation, NGS quantification, nucleic acid monitoring, rare allele detection, pathogen detection, and DNA methylation analysis.

title: Real-Time PCR Total RNA, References and Controls
name: Total RNA, References & Controls for Real-Time PCR (qPCR) applications
description: Learn about our selection of high quality Total RNA, References & Controls for your Real-Time PCR (qPCR) applications, including Human, Rat and Mouse Reference RNA, Alien Reference RNA QRT-PCR Detection Kit for Monitoring the Overall Performance of QRT-PCR Assays, Universal Reverse Primer, Passive Reference Dye (Rox) to normalize real-time PCR data, Human U6 Forward Primer, MVP Total mouse and rat RNA and more. Our RNA has the maximum representation of low, medium, and high abundant gene transcripts and no detectable levels of genomic DNA.

title: Real-Time PCR cDNA Synthesis Kits
name: cDNA Synthesis Kits for qPCR Applications
description: Learn about our cDNA Synthesis kits which are fully optimized for real-time quantitative PCR (qPCR) applications. Our cDNA Synthesis kits are designed for the highest efficiency conversion of RNA to high quality cDNA. Our kit uses a fast, easy-to-use 15-minute cDNA synthesis step that allows you to generate cDNA up to 12 kb in less than 25 minutes.

title: Research Flow Cytometry
name: Flow Cytometry for Research
description: Flow cytometry is a powerful technique used to quantitively measure individual cells and other particles in suspension, at the rate of thousands of cells per second. Most commonly used in the context of immunology, we have also started to see the adaption of flow cytometry for environmental studies, extracellular vesicle analysis, and the ability to measure many parameters simultaneously, in both conventional and spectral formats, for more comprehensive analysis. Agilent flow cytometers offer excellent capabilities, high quality data, and an easy to use platform to save researchers time when acquiring and analyzing data.

title: Flow Cytometers
name: Flow cytometers to advance your research and increase your productivity
description: Agilent flow cytometers offer excellent capabilities, high quality data, and an easy-to-use platform to save researchers time when acquiring and analyzing experiments. Explore the cutting-edge technology Agilent has implemented into flow cytometry to advance your research and increase your productivity.

title: Flow Cytometry Software
name: NovoExpress software simplifies flow cytometry workflow and analysis
description: Flow cytometry software is the key interface between the researcher and the instrument, so meeting your requirements and being easy to use is important. Streamline your sample acquisition and data analysis with the NovoExpress Software. This flow cytometer software combines sample acquisition and data analysis. Analyze acquired data in real time during flow experiments and maximize your productivity, even while samples are acquiring in the background. Custom statistical parameters provide live updates when running samples. Perform accurate pre- and post-acquisition compensation easily, conduct batch analysis and reporting, create figures with customizable features, and export data in a variety of formats.

title: Sample Preparation for Analytical Chemistry
name: Ensure Confident Results with Sample Preparation
description: Sample preparation, or sample prep, is an essential part of chromatographic and spectroscopic analyses. The purpose of sample prep is to convert the sample into a form suitable for analysis without significant loss of target compounds. Proper sample preparation removes potentially interfering contamination, which extends the lifetime of your chromatography column and other instrument components. Agilent’s suite of sample preparation products ensure you have the right product for your needs. Our purification and filtration products provide quick and reliable results for repeated analyses and are ideal for busy, high-throughput laboratories. Pre-packaged QuEChERS extraction and dispersive solid phase extraction (dSPE) kits are ideal for food samples and accommodate AOAC and EN methodologies. We also offer a full portfolio of solid supported liquid extraction (SLE), solid phase extraction (SPE), and solid phase microextraction (SPME) products in various chemistries and formats to achieve excellent performance and ensure samples are free of interferences, even with complex matrices.

title: Software & Informatics
name: Lab Software for Optimizing Laboratory Operations
description: Agilent laboratory software offers the control that businesses demand, as well as the flexibility and technical functionality that cutting-edge labs require. Our portfolio features a range of high-quality solutions to ensure your laboratory can make the most of every analytical system. We offer analytical data systems for instrument control and data analysis, laboratory informatics and automation software, data and workflow management, and additional lab software packages to enhance data visualization and mining.

OpenLab software improves lab throughput and the quality of your results and will be an integral part of your data integrity strategy.

description: Agilent provides a wide variety of lab management software designed to support your lab’s operational efficiency and productivity.

description: iLab core facility management is a modular, web-based, asset management software tool designed to support operations for centralized labs and shared resource facilities. Its functionality includes calendars for reserving specific resources, access control for sensitive or validated equipment, time and cost-tracking against projects, and managing on-hand inventory in the labs and in central stockrooms. Our team has extensive experience integrating iLab with institutional financial and identity management systems. More than 2,400 core facilities and other shared resource facilities across over 215 organizations in North America, Europe, and the Asia-Pacific region rely on the iLab software to streamline operations.

name: Increase Visibility and Control Across Your Entire Lab

For labs that are ready to access cloud-based capabilities, CrossLab Connect uses advances in IoT and analytics capabilities to enable optimization through lab-wide asset monitoring and business intelligence. Ultimately, CrossLab Connect helps you realize all the benefits of a smart, connected lab.

title: Pathology Solution Connectivity Software
