description: Learn how lab managers, lab technicians, and pathologists can reduce the risk of transcription errors, eliminate the need for relabeling, and automatically register slide handling information with DakoLink software.

title: Data Management Software
name: Data Management Software to Securely Store Your Lab Data
description: OpenLab data management solutions offer secure, centralized management of your instrument raw data, PDF reports, and all other electronic records. Automated processes enable you to organize and retrieve information instantly, from any location. And whether you need to securely store your data on premises or in the cloud, we offer flexible, scalable solutions to address your data storage needs.

title: Dissolution Software
name: Dissolution Software for Enhanced Data Management
description: Agilent dissolution software systems enable more effective management and analysis of dissolution data, while ensuring ongoing regulatory compliance. Our dissolution testing data systems integrate analysis and sampling and provide real-time access to test status and simultaneous control of multiple systems.

title: GPC/SEC Software
name: GPC/SEC Data Systems for Enhanced Control and Performance
description: Agilent GPC/SEC data systems enable powerful control, data acquisition, calculations, and result reporting. For accurate molecular weight analysis and complete polymer and protein characterization, GPC/SEC software provides the functionality required for conventional and advanced GPC/SEC in a simple, powerful, fully integrated package. GPC/SEC software for OpenLAB CDS adds application-specific calibration, data processing, and reporting to your OpenLAB CDS. Cirrus GPC Multi Detector software, an add-on to OpenLAB CDS ChemStation, allows you to process conventional GPC data using a column calibration. Bio-SEC software is a dedicated standalone package for characterisation of proteins and other biomolecules.

title: Genomics Software & Informatics
name: Data Analysis Solutions for High-Performance Genomics Labs
description: No matter how you approach genomics, Agilent offers a solution for getting the most valuable insights from your data. Tailored to sequencing, microarray, gene expression, and clinical data workflows, our portfolio of robust data analysis and triage solutions greatly improves time-to-results through automation and standardization. Designed for high-performance genomics labs, both clinical and research, our range of advanced products and optimized assays provides end-to-end analyses of raw DNA and RNA data. Seamlessly flow from detection, annotation, and visualization through to clinical-grade reports. Across applications and assays, data amounts and variant types, Agilent has the right solution to meet your variant analysis needs.

title: HPLC & CE Instrument Software
name: HPLC Software and LC Drivers for Powerful and Flexible Instrument Control
description: Ensure convenient and intuitive operation of Agilent HPLC and UHPLC hardware with powerful chromatography data systems. Leverage LC and CE drivers, the core of our CDS, to control your Agilent HPLC systems and workflow solutions.

title: Instrument Maintenance & Diagnostics Software
name: Agilent CrossLab Instrument Maintenance and Diagnostic Software
description: Instrument Maintenance and Diagnostic Software monitors instrument health and provides email-based alerts, notifying you when to consider replacing key consumables, when to perform preventive maintenance, and when an instrument stops running anywhere in your lab. This software is also designed to track inventories, manage schedules, aggregate data, provide resource visibility, and integrate with other lab systems. Monitoring is available for a wide range of instruments and allows you to capture lab-wide instrument utilization data across all of your workflows. These capabilities are designed to deliver reduced downtime and sustained instrument performance, driving simplification, optimization, and transformation of lab operations.

title: Lab Workflow Management Software
name: Lab Workflow Management Software for Optimizing Lab Processes
description: Use Agilent workflow management software to quickly integrate software systems, track sample state and disposition, or optimize lab processes. Avoid long implementation projects with capabilities tailored to your most immediate needs.

title: Mass Spectrometry Software
name: MassHunter Software for Advanced Mass Spectrometry Applications
description: The MassHunter software suite supports efficient data acquisition, qualitative data analysis, mass spectral library management, quantitative data analysis, easy access, and reporting for Agilent GC/MS and LC/MS systems. Data acquisition software for GC/MS and LC/MS allows straightforward setup and operation of the entire system, while powerful data analysis software and application-specific software tools streamline the analysis workflow for any sample task. Powerful library management software with extensive curated libraries and databases for Q-TOF instruments facilitates unknowns identification. Finally, simplified software interfaces for mass spectrometry provide access to the power of mass spectrometry to anyone.

title: Molecular Spectroscopy Software
name: Comprehensive Software Solutions for Molecular Spectroscopy
description: Molecular Spectroscopy analytical software helps you to collect and analyze data from your spectrophotometer, turning data into meaningful results. Application focused and easy to use, these platforms enable flexible system control supporting our FTIR, UV-Vis, UV-Vis-NIR, LDIR and fluorescence spectrophotometers.

title: Specific Proteins
name: Specific Proteins
description: Our Specific Proteins portfolio includes reagents for different applications such as turbidimetry and nephelometry, and secondary antibodies for ELISA. These techniques exploit the fast, specific reaction between antibody and antigen. The products for turbidimetry and nephelometry can be used on a variety of different, fully-automated instruments.

title: ELISA
name: ELISA
description: The ELISA (enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay) format is a highly sensitive technique commonly used to quantify soluble molecules such as proteins, antibodies and hormones.

Agilent's spectroscopy supplies are crafted for accuracy and precision.

title: Analytical Reference Materials & Standards

description: Agilent, now with former Ultra Scientific, offers a comprehensive portfolio of analytical standards, spectroscopy standards, reference materials, and certified reference materials for environmental, food safety, elemental analysis, instrument calibration, tuning mixes, and more. Reference materials and certified reference materials are substances that are tested to be homogenous and have fixed values of its concentrations. These chromatography standards are a critical component of your application workflow, which encompasses sample prep, instruments, columns, supplies, and services. The success of your analysis depends upon the quality of your reference material. All Agilent standard reference materials have been manufactured to the highest quality in an ISO 9001, ISO 17025 and 17034 accredited facilities to ensure the accuracy of your analyses.

title: Atomic Spectroscopy
name: Atomic Spectroscopy: The Value of Knowing
description: Knowing the right information at the right time can help you cut through the everyday complexities of your samples, instrument needs, regulations, other demands on your time and resources – and help you handle unexpected challenges. The most valuable thing an analytical solution can deliver is the confidence of knowing you’ll get the answers you need, when you need them. Driven by insights from customers from around the world, Agilent has created an innovative atomic spectroscopy portfolio – spanning instruments, consumables, standards, services, software, and more – to bring that confidence to your lab.

title: Atomic Absorption Spectroscopy (AAS)
name: Know Your Flame Measurements Will Be Quick and Your Furnace Sensitive
description: Atomic Absorption Spectroscopy (AAS) is a common technique for quantifying metals in a wide variety of samples. Flame AAS is for general use and is low-cost and easy to use. Furnace AAS delivers better detection limits. The AA Duo models give you the best of both worlds. Agilent offers a range of atomic absorption spectrophotometers to suit any analytical need or budget. Our portfolio of AAS spectrometers includes fast Flame Atomic Absorption instruments, and sensitive graphite furnace AAS instruments, so you are sure to find one to suit your needs

title: Microwave Plasma Atomic Emission Spectroscopy (MP-AES)
name: Know You Can Measure Elements Without the Cost and Risk of Flammable Gases
description: Agilent microwave plasma atomic emission spectrometers (MP-AES) have higher sensitivity, lower detection limits (down to sub-ppb levels) and are faster than conventional flame atomic absorption (FAA). MP-AES systems “run on air” instead of combustible gases, so are safer to operate and, in utilizing a nitrogen plasma, are capable of delivering the lowest cost of ownership. When coupled with the extensive range of MP-AES accessories that are also available, you are sure to meet your goals.

title: Inductively Coupled Plasma Optical Emission Spectroscopy (ICP-OES)
name: Know Your Lab Will Be Productive and Your Results Reliable
description: Inductively Coupled Plasma Optical Emission Spectroscopy (ICP-OES), also known as Inductively Coupled Plasma Atomic Emission Spectroscopy (ICP-AES), is a well-established technique for determining elements in a wide variety of samples. To learn more about it, check out our FAQs in the Learning Tools box. Agilent ICP-OES systems are packed with smart functions, both in the hardware and the software, that deliver reliable analytical results and slash wasted time in the lab. Analysts will know exactly when cleaning or routine maintenance of their ICP-OES or ICP-AES is required, thanks to sensors built into the system. Lab managers will know that the results from their ICP-OES system are accurate thanks to algorithms that find interferences and provide backup results. Whatever your lab needs, you are sure to find the right ICP-OES here. If you need some help or have a question, contact us via one of the links on the product pages; we’d love to help you out.

title: Inductively Coupled Plasma Mass Spectrometry (ICP-MS)
name: Know Your Results Will Be Accurate at All Levels, Whatever the Sample Type
description: Inductively Coupled Plasma Mass Spectrometry (ICP-MS) is a very popular technique for the analysis of elements in a wide range of samples. It is a very sensitive technique and can measure very low concentrations, even in challenging matrices. To learn more about it, check out our FAQs in the Learning Tools box. Agilent Inductively Coupled Plasma Mass Spectrometry (ICP-MS) is available in single quadrupole and triple quadrupole configurations. Our single quadrupole ICP-MS is perfect for typical ICP-MS measurements from routine, regulated analysis to advanced research and demanding applications. Our triple quadrupole ICP-MS will give you the confidence of knowing you can resolve problematic interferences – even in your most difficult samples – delivering results you know you can trust. Whether you need single quadrupole or triple quadrupole, you will find the right solution for your lab right here. If you need some help or have a question, contact us via one of the links on the product pages; we’re here to help.

title: Atomic Spectroscopy Automation
name: Know That Your Lab Automation Solutions Will Deliver Higher-Quality Data Faster
description: Atomic spectroscopy automation can reduce human errors and sample contamination while increasing data quality and reducing the time it takes to get results. Agilent offers all-Agilent lab automation solutions that include sample and standard preparation, autodilution, sample delivery, and washout. Discover the range of Agilent automation solutions and see how you can make automation work for you.

Also a porrtfolio of supplies guaranteed to work with your PerkinElmer AS-90/90A/90plus/91/93plus/S10 autosamplers used with PerkinElmer AAS, ICP-OES & ICP-MS systems

title: Supplies and Consumables
name: Explore our comprehensive portfolio of columns and supplies for HPLC, GC, and spectroscopy instruments.
description: Discover the largest portfolio of columns, supplies, and consumables for high-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC), gas chromatography (GC), and spectroscopy instruments. Our comprehensive portfolio includes chromatography columns, instrument supplies, chemical standards, sample prep products, syringes & needles, and vials. Agilent consumables are designed for optimal performance and consistency across multiple runs.

name: Disintegration Testing Accessories for Harmonized Regulatory Requirements
description: Agilent offers many disintegration accessories including beakers and basket rack assemblies in both standard and verified versions.

title: Dissolution Accessories & Supplies
name: Ensure Excellent Dissolution Performance using Agilent Dissolution Accessories
description: Agilent provides a full portfolio of dissolution accessories to measure the release rate of an active pharmaceutical ingredient (API) from a dosage form, including tablets, capsules, semisolids, transdermal patches, microspheres, and implants. Our dissolution accessories range from standard system components such as shafts, paddles, baskets, cannula filters, and vessels to more specialized accessories such as intrinsic dissolution. It is essential to choose compliant dissolution accessories to ensure reproducibility and consistency from test to test. We also offer some dissolution tester parts for non-compendial dissolution apparatus with additional configurations to provide drug release information for the API and topical formulations.

title: Thin Layer Chromatography
name: Chromatography Paper is used in thin layer chromatography (TLC) applications such as evaluating radioisotope purity.
description: Chromatography Paper is used in thin layer chromatography (TLC) applications such as evaluating radioisotope purity.

title: Vacuum Technologies
name: Innovative Vacuum Pumps and Leak Detection Solutions
description: Agilent vacuum pumps, pumping systems, measurement instruments, components, and helium leak detectors allow you to create, measure, and maintain vacuum for your applications, processes, or research. Learn about Agilent's clean, dry, quiet IDP scroll pumps, high performance, high compression TwisTorr turbo pumps, optimized, UHV/XHV ready ion pumps and controllers, and rugged, reliable helium leak detectors. Agilent leverages its Varian Vacuum roots to fulfill your vacuum needs with product value and experienced, knowledgeable support. Agilent pumps, systems, and components enable advanced research in physics, analytical instrumentation, and nanotechnology, they are also a perfect fit for industrial processes.

title: Ion Pumps & Controllers
name: Ion Pumps and Control Units for Ultra High (UHV) and Extreme High Vacuum (XHV)
description: Agilent Vacuum (formerly Varian) offers a complete portfolio of VacIon ion pumps that provide various pumping speeds (from 0.4 to 1000 L/s). Agilent also supplies smart combinations titanium sublimation pumps (Ion CombiTSP) and Non-Evaporable Getter (Ion CombiNEG) pumps for clean and vibration-free environments. Agilent ion pumps and controllers can be customized in a number of configurations to satisfy your vacuum requirements. They are the best choice for those applications where stable ultrahigh or extreme-high vacuum (UHV or XHV) conditions are essential, such as: laboratories, large research facilities, medical devices, scanning electron microscopes, and surface analysis tools.

title: Turbo Pumps & Controllers
name: High Vacuum Turbo Pumps and Controllers for Optimal Vacuum Performance
description: Agilent provides robust, industry-leading turbomolecular vacuum pumps and controllers that deliver complete confidence across a broad range of applications in academia, research, nanotechnologies, analytical instrumentation, and industry. Agilent turbo pumps range from 70 to 2300 L/s and feature innovative designs backed by exhaustive testing and trusted after-sales support.

title: Turbo Pumping Systems (TPS)
name: Turbo Pumping Stations (TPS) to Optimize Vacuum in Your Laboratory or Plant
description: Agilent manufactures robust, industry-leading turbomolecular pumping systems/stations (TPS) that deliver complete confidence across a broad range of applications in laboratories and industry. Our turbo pumping solutions are equipped with TwisTorr FS family turbomolecular pumps ranging from 70 to 700 L/s, IDP and TriScroll dry primary pumps from 3 to 30 m3/h, DS rotary vane pumps from 5 to 30 m3/h and smart pressure reading gauges. These innovative systems fulfill your every need through modular or integrated platforms including small light turbo pumping stations, benchtop units, and roll-around cart turbo pumping systems.

title: Diffusion Pumps
name: Oil Diffusion Vacuum Pumps for Demanding High Vacuum Applications
description: Agilent VHS and HS diffusion pumps have pumping speeds from 65 L/s to 28,000 L/s, in an operating range of 1 x 10-3 Torr to 5 x 10-9 Torr. Our patented bulge body diffusion pump design maximizes pump throughput while delivering pressure stability and reducing backstreaming to a minimum, which is ideal for critical applications such as vacuum coating, metallizing, brazing and heat treatment. Agilent offers a broad range of pump sizes with multiple flange options, as well as input voltages (from 90 V to 575 V) so you can find the right pump fit for your application. Our wide range of accessories includes robust heaters, baffles, cold caps, and thermal protection switches to keep your downtime to a minimum.

title: Dry Scroll Pumps
name: Scroll Pumps to Provide Oil-Free, Quiet and Sustainable Vacuum
description: Scroll pumps generate vacuum using a simple dual-scroll mechanism, in which one nested scroll orbits within the other, creating moving zones of captured gas. After the gas enters the scroll set at the perimeter, it is displaced and compressed toward the center hub, where it is exhausted. Quick predictable maintenance procedures minimize service down time and cost of ownership. Dry scroll pumps are an excellent alternative to oil-sealed pumps as they eliminate harmful oil emissions and the need for hazardous waste disposal. Agilent IDP scroll pumps provide quiet, clean, and oil-free vacuum. These hermetic, dry pumps are well suited for analytical instrumentation, cryogenics, helium recirculation, freeze dryers, and backing turbo pumps. The newest IDP-35 and IDP-45 dry scroll pumps feature smart, user-friendly technology for increased control and precision, as well as remote real-time monitoring of your vacuum system. Agilent TriScroll pumps are a proven robust & reliable scroll pump with high pumping speeds, low base pressures, and an optional inverter or 3-phase motor. TriScroll pumps are used in leak detection, manufacturing processes, and other industrial applications.

title: Oil Sealed Rotary Vane Pumps
name: Single and Two-Stage, Oil Sealed Rotary Vane Pumps for Broad Applications
description: Single and two-stage rotary vane pumps provide a wide range of pumping speeds and configurations. These pumps are ideal as backing pumps for turbo or diffusion pumps, or for standalone use in laboratory, analytical, or industrial applications. The DS series oil-sealed rotary vane vacuum pumps offers models with pumping speeds from 45 to 605 L/min (1,6 to 21,4 cfm), with an ultimate pressure of <2x10E-03 mbar. These DS-series pumps operate at very low noise levels. The MS series high capacity, single stage, oil-lubricated rotary vane pumps are compact and environmentally friendly alternatives to larger industrial pumps with similar speeds. The flexible MS series features reliable components, high pumping speeds at low pressure, low noise, and easy installation.

title: Roots Pumps (RP) & Roots Pumping Systems (RPS)
name: Roots Pumps and Roots Pumping Systems to Boost Pump Down Speed
description: RP roots pumps are designed for optimum system integration and enable the continuous operation and monitoring of vacuum systems. These pumps deliver low noise and vibration levels, and the compact, easy-to-use systems also have long maintenance intervals. High-quality air-cooled RPS roots pumping systems combine the ruggedness and reliability of high capacity MS-series pumps with the wide operating range of roots pumps. Roots pumps and roots pumping systems are ideal for use in applications demanding the highest levels of cleanliness and as backing pumps for industrial processes such as large area coating, E-beam welding, helium leak detection, Liquified Natural Gas (LNG), vacuum metallurgy, and heat treatment.

title: Helium Leak Detectors
name: Ensure Stability and Performance in Any Leak Detection Application
description: Agilent’s range of leak detection solutions ensure the safety, security, and consistent performance of research, vacuum, and industrial process systems. Our Helium Leak Detector (HLD), PHD-4 and Multi-Gas CrossLab sniffers, as well as C15 component leak detector are rugged, precise, and easy-to-use instruments that accurately and efficiently detect leaks in an array of industrial applications. For clean research applications, HLD configurations employ clean, dry, quiet scroll vacuum pumps. Our leak detectors feature automated start-up and calibration for maximum productivity, built in application set-ups, and an array of accessories to make any leak detection process simple.

title: Vacuum Measurement
name: High Quality Gauges and Controllers for Accurate Vacuum Measurement
description: Agilent's full range of active and passive vacuum gauges and gauge controllers from atmosphere to UHV/XHV allow you to precisely and reliably control and measure vacuum. We offer Thermocouple (TC), Bayard Alpert (BA), Pirani, Inverted Magnetron (IMG), and Hot Filament (HFIG) gauges. Our gauge controllers are compatible with both Agilent and competitors' gauges and can handle up to 12 channels. Agilent controllers come with several communication interfaces including Profibus, ethernet, and RS-232/485 (other interfaces may be available upon request). There is also the option of a portable gauge controller (HGC-536).

title: Vacuum Components & Hardware
name: Reliable Hardware for your Vacuum Instruments
description: Agilent offers a range of vacuum fittings, system components, and valves. Maintain a consistent vacuum with our range of gate valves, isolation valves, feedthroughs, adapters, hoses, couples, nipples, tees for any type of flange (ConFlat, Clamp, and ISO). Ensure a reliable seal with our vacuum sealants, lubricants, and greases (Torr Seal and Apiezon).

title: Vacuum & Leak Detection Software
name: Vacuum and Leak Detection Software and App to Optimize Workflows
description: Agilent vacuum and leak detection software and app provide the data management performance needed to meet manufacturing yields, quality-control standards, and compliance requirements in industrial vacuum applications. The powerful Vacuum Link app offers wireless remote pump control, making it easy to monitor your system. A-PLUS software enables the user to control and monitor vacuum solutions. Leak Test Data Wizard software enables powerful tracking and automation of leak detection processes.

name: HPLC and UHPLC Solutions for Efficient Analysis and Reliable Results
description:
Discover Agilent InfinityLab LC solutions that include instruments, columns, consumables, software, and supplies. From routine analysis to cutting-edge scientific research, the InfinityLab LC Series offers the broadest portfolio of HPLC and UHPLC systems to deliver great science with any budget. When you chose to invest in Agilent HPLC, you can rely on reliable liquid chromatography instruments and comprehensive services, designed to maximize laboratory uptime.

Choose your InfinityLab LC solutions and find HPLC accessories here.

title: Flame Atomic Absorption Instruments
name: Flame Atomic Absorption Instruments

Able to handle multi-element suites with ease, the Agilent 240FS AA system is ideal for environmental, food, and agriculture labs. The 240FS AA features automatic lamp selection, programmable gas box, and D2 background correction.
features: Reduce your analysis time by determining the concentration of all elements from a single aspiration
Reduce sample consumption with less delay throughout analysis and less sample waste
Get accurate results by determining 10 elements per sample in less than 2 minutes without sacrificing data quality
Improve precision and accuracy with online internal standard corrections for physical differences, sample preparation errors, or drift
Simplify your analysis by taking the guess work out of the method development with the SpectrAA comprehensive cookbook
Tune your flame AA performance with the Mark 7 atomization system
Mark 7 atomization system can achieve high sensitivity – typically greater than 0.9 Abs from 5 mg/L Cu

title: 8890 GC System
name: 8890 GC System
description:
The 8890 Gas Chromatograph (GC) System delivers fast and accurate results with flexible configuration capabilities to address specific analysis demands. When accurate results are critical and instrument uptime is a must, this intelligent, high-performance GC consistently exceeds expectations.

Built-in intelligence and sixth-generation EPC enable autonomous diagnostics that check GC system health and alert you to potential issues and how to solve them. Step-by-step instructions for common gas chromatograph maintenance procedures are presented on the touch screen or remotely through the GC browser interface.
features: The browser interface provides remote connectivity enabling you to monitor your smart GC system, check system logs, and perform diagnostics tests, from inside or outside the laboratory
The full-function touch screen gives a visual report of the system configuration letting you update the active method, perform maintenance routines, and check GC instrument status

Built-in intelligence autonomously monitors the health of the system, alerts the user of potential issues before they affect chromatographic performance, and offers helpful step-by-step guides to resolve issues

Unique sixth-generation microchannel-based EPC architecture provides a significant improvement in reliability and longevity against gas contaminants such as particulates, water, and oils, extending system uptime and the life of the instrument consumables

Capillary Flow Technology (CFT) modules, which are oven mountable and very low thermal mass, provide unique gas flow connections for multidimensional gas chromatography (GC x GC/Deans Switch), comprehensive two-dimensional gas chromatography (2D-GC) with flow modulation, and backflush at the beginning, middle, or end of an analytical column

Single-filament thermal conductivity detector (TCD) does not require a separate reference gas or manual potentiometer adjustment, yet provides a stable baseline with a minimal amount of signal drift commonly seen with valve switching
Autoranging flame ionization detector (FID) provides the ability to detect and quantitate from percent levels to parts per billion (ppb) in a single GC injection
Compatible with all GC/MS platforms
Sulfur or nitrogen chemiluminescence detector provides low ppb detection, equimolar response, and quantitation for sulfur or nitrogen contaminants without quenching from matrix
Helium conservation module, Gas Saver, and alternative carrier gas solutions can dramatically reduce the amount of helium used, offering flexibility and cost savings

Optional Hydrogen Sensor Module Series 2 detects hydrogen leaks early and shuts off gas flows, continuously monitors status using built-in intelligent diagnostics, and requires calibration only every six months
Optional Smart Keys, included with GC columns, provide information such as column usage with default parameters for configuration that helps automate method setup
Independently audited for environmental impact throughout the product lifecycle, received My Green Lab’s ACT (Accountability, Consistency, Transparency) label
applications: The versatility and flexibility of the 8890 GC allows it to address virtually any application your lab may require, from simple direct injections to complex methods. It has been used to test natural and refinery gas, petroleum-based samples, and solvents in the energy and chemical sector. It is used by environmental labs to detect and measure persistent organic pollutants in air, soil, and water. Food companies rely on the 8890 GC to ensure quality, safety, and authenticity.
